title: Artifact download utility with type-specific content handling
purpose: Provides a function to download various types of artifacts (diagrams, documents, designs, etc.) by fetching their content and creating downloadable files.
module_context: Exports a single async function for downloading artifacts of different types with appropriate MIME types and filenames.

methods.name: downloadArtifact
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, item: Item): Promise<void>

steps.content: Determine the artifact type and fetch the corresponding content from the API.
IF the API fetch returns no data, exit early without creating a file.
Format the content appropriately based on the artifact type, including JSON stringification for structured data.
Construct a filename with appropriate extension based on the artifact type and name.
Create a blob with the formatted content and specified MIME type.
Generate a temporary URL for the blob and create a download link element.
Trigger the browser's download mechanism by simulating a click on the link.
Clean up the temporary URL and remove the link element from the DOM.
